mapper.select: SELECT start_time AS startTime, COUNT(*) AS reservedCount FROM reservation WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId} AND reservation_date = #{reservationDate} AND status = 'CONFIRMED' GROUP BY start_time ORDER BY start_time

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.user_id AS userId, r.facility_id AS facilityId, f.name AS facilityName, r.reservation_date AS reservationDate, r.start_time AS startTime, r.end_time AS endTime, r.seat_no AS seatNo, r.status, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reservation r JOIN facility f ON f.facility_id = r.facility_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}
